claim: Evidence gathered by explorer and cross-checker is sufficient to verify that YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements boundary audit system for detecting project file mutations and blocking PRD readiness, but requires clarification on agent_tool_profile normalization implementation.

evidence.summary: File has exactly 217 lines, confirming cross-checker correction that explorer cited non-existent lines 468-517
evidence.why: Verifies cross-checker found documentation error in explorer evidence

evidence.summary: buildProviderInvocation() handles Claude permission mode (line 80) and tool filtering (lines 84-92) but contains no agent_tool_profile normalization
evidence.why: Confirms cross-checker finding that agent_tool_profile normalization is absent from this file

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot() and diffBoundarySnapshots() implement SHA256-based file mutation detection
evidence.why: Verifies core boundary audit mechanism is implemented as claimed

evidence.summary: Boundary violations map to BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers and override prd_ready to false
evidence.why: Verifies enforcement mechanism blocks PRD readiness on mutations

evidence.summary: Tests prove boundary detection blocks project mutations and catches untracked file changes
evidence.why: Verifies boundary audit system works in practice with test coverage

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues() validates evidence records declare explicit scope values
evidence.why: Verifies evidence scope validation enforcement for PRD readiness

risks: Agent tool profile normalization to boundary/research/full profiles may not exist or may be implemented elsewhere unknown to current evidence
Claude permission mode configuration for full-tool evidence agents cannot be verified from provider-adapter.ts alone

result.notes: Core boundary audit claim verified: 6 of 7 evidence records confirm SHA256 snapshot detection, mutation blocking, test coverage, and scope validation. Cross-checker correctly identified explorer documentation error (non-existent lines 468-517 in provider-adapter.ts). Missing agent_tool_profile normalization logic does not invalidate the core boundary audit claim—it is a separate configuration concern. The boundary system detects mutations and blocks PRD readiness as claimed. Evidence is sufficient for PRD readiness on the primary claim.
